name: Caraway Rye
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Flour; better for bread flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flours, salt, and caraway seeds in a large bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, dissolve yeast in warm water.
3. Add the yeast mixture and butter to the dry ingredients. Mix until a dough forms.
4. Knead the dough on a floured surface until smooth and elastic.
5. Place the dough in an oiled bowl, cover, and let rise for 1 hour or until doubled in size.
6. Shape the risen dough into a loaf and place it on a greased baking sheet.
7. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown and hollow to the touch.
8. Let cool before serving. Enjoy!
